name: Fat Zebra
description: Australian card payment gateway and PCI-DSS vault — also operates SecurePay for Australian merchants.

seo.title: Fat Zebra — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Fat Zebra: Australian card payment gateway and PCI-DSS vault — also operates SecurePay for Australian merchants.

when_to_use: Australian card payment gateway with PCI DSS vault for local merchants
SecurePay migration path to Fat Zebra for Australian e-commerce
Card-on-file tokenization for recurring billing in Australian market

review.verdict: Practical Australian choice for local acquiring and card vaulting — limited outside ANZ.
review.best_for: Australian and NZ merchants needing local acquiring with PCI vault
review.not_for: Global businesses wanting a single multi-region gateway

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down

lock_in.reason: PCI vault binds tokens to gateway
